is_invertible_2cell (lassociator f g h)
 apply is_invertible_2cell_lassociator.
  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
k: C ⟦ a, d ⟧
x: f · (g · h) ==> k
y: f · g · h ==> k
p: rassociator f g h • x = y
y = (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) ^-1 • x
 exact (!p).
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g • (f ◃ lunitor g) =
runitor f ▹ g


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g • (f ◃ lunitor g) =
runitor f ▹ g

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator f (identity b) g)
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ lunitor g = ?inv_x ^-1 • (runitor f ▹ g)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator f (identity b) g)
 apply is_invertible_2cell_rassociator. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ lunitor g =
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f (identity b) g) ^-1
• (runitor f ▹ g)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ lunitor g =
lassociator f (identity b) g • (runitor f ▹ g)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
lassociator f (identity b) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g

  apply runitor_rwhisker.
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g • id2 f ⋆ lunitor g =
runitor f ⋆ id2 g


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g • id2 f ⋆ lunitor g =
runitor f ⋆ id2 g

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g
• ((id2 f ▹ identity b · g) • (f ◃ lunitor g)) =
(runitor f ▹ g) • (f ◃ id2 g)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g
• (id2 (f · (identity b · g)) • (f ◃ lunitor g)) =
(runitor f ▹ g) • (f ◃ id2 g)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g
• (id2 (f · (identity b · g)) • (f ◃ lunitor g)) =
(runitor f ▹ g) • id2 (f · g)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g
• (id2 (f · (identity b · g)) • (f ◃ lunitor g)) =
runitor f ▹ g

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
rassociator f (identity b) g • (f ◃ lunitor g) =
runitor f ▹ g

  apply lunitor_lwhisker.
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
φ: g1 ==> g2
η ⋆ φ = hcomp' η φ


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f1 ==> f2
φ: g1 ==> g2
η ⋆ φ = hcomp' η φ

  apply vcomp_whisker.
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3) • lassociator g1 g2 g3 =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3) • lassociator g1 g2 g3 =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
((x1 ▹ f2 · f3) • (g1 ◃ ((x2 ▹ f3) • (g2 ◃ x3))))
• lassociator g1 g2 g3 =
lassociator f1 f2 f3
• ((((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3) • (g1 · g2 ◃ x3))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
((x1 ▹ f2 · f3)
 • ((g1 ◃ (x2 ▹ f3)) • (g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ x3))))
• lassociator g1 g2 g3 =
lassociator f1 f2 f3
• ((((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3) • (g1 · g2 ◃ x3))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
(x1 ▹ f2 · f3)
• ((g1 ◃ (x2 ▹ f3))
   • ((g1 ◃ (g2 ◃ x3)) • lassociator g1 g2 g3)) =
lassociator f1 f2 f3
• ((((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3) • (g1 · g2 ◃ x3))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
(x1 ▹ f2 · f3)
• ((g1 ◃ (x2 ▹ f3))
   • (lassociator g1 g2 f3 • (g1 · g2 ◃ x3))) =
lassociator f1 f2 f3
• ((((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3) • (g1 · g2 ◃ x3))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
(((x1 ▹ f2 · f3) • (g1 ◃ (x2 ▹ f3)))
 • lassociator g1 g2 f3) • (g1 · g2 ◃ x3) =
(lassociator f1 f2 f3 • (((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3))
• (g1 · g2 ◃ x3)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
((x1 ▹ f2 · f3) • (g1 ◃ (x2 ▹ f3)))
• lassociator g1 g2 f3 =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • (((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
(x1 ▹ f2 · f3)
• ((g1 ◃ (x2 ▹ f3)) • lassociator g1 g2 f3) =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • (((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
(x1 ▹ f2 · f3)
• (lassociator g1 f2 f3 • ((g1 ◃ x2) ▹ f3)) =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • (((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
((x1 ▹ f2 · f3) • lassociator g1 f2 f3)
• ((g1 ◃ x2) ▹ f3) =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • (((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
(lassociator f1 f2 f3 • ((x1 ▹ f2) ▹ f3))
• ((g1 ◃ x2) ▹ f3) =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • (((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
lassociator f1 f2 f3
• (((x1 ▹ f2) ▹ f3) • ((g1 ◃ x2) ▹ f3)) =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • (((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
((x1 ▹ f2) ▹ f3) • ((g1 ◃ x2) ▹ f3) =
((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) ▹ f3

  apply rwhisker_vcomp.
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor f)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor f)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id2 (identity a · f)
× linvunitor f • lunitor f = id2 f

  abstract (apply (lunitor_linvunitor _ ,, linvunitor_lunitor _)).
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (linvunitor f)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (linvunitor f)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
linvunitor f • lunitor f = id2 f
× lunitor f • linvunitor f = id2 (identity a · f)

  abstract (apply (linvunitor_lunitor _ ,, lunitor_linvunitor _)).
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (runitor f)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (runitor f)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
runitor f • rinvunitor f = id2 (f · identity b)
× rinvunitor f • runitor f = id2 f

  abstract (apply (runitor_rinvunitor _ ,, rinvunitor_runitor _)).
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (rinvunitor f)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (rinvunitor f)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
rinvunitor f • runitor f = id2 f
× runitor f • rinvunitor f = id2 (f · identity b)

  abstract (apply (rinvunitor_runitor _ ,, runitor_rinvunitor _)).
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 • rassociator g1 g2 g3 =
rassociator f1 f2 f3 • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 • rassociator g1 g2 g3 =
rassociator f1 f2 f3 • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator g1 g2 g3)
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 =
(rassociator f1 f2 f3 • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)) • ?inv_y ^-1

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator g1 g2 g3)
 apply is_invertible_2cell_rassociator. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 =
(rassociator f1 f2 f3 • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3))
• (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g1 g2 g3) ^-1

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 =
rassociator f1 f2 f3
• (x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)
   • (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g1 g2 g3) ^-1)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
rassociator f1 f2 f3
• (x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)
   • (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g1 g2 g3) ^-1) =
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator f1 f2 f3)
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)
• (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g1 g2 g3) ^-1 =
?inv_x ^-1 • x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
is_invertible_2cell (rassociator f1 f2 f3)
 apply is_invertible_2cell_rassociator. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1, g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3, g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)
• (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator g1 g2 g3) ^-1 =
(is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f1 f2 f3) ^-1
• x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3

  apply hcomp_lassoc.
Qed.



C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
y: g1 ==> g2
id2 f ⋆ y = f ◃ y


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
y: g1 ==> g2
id2 f ⋆ y = f ◃ y

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
y: g1 ==> g2
(id2 f ▹ g1) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ y

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
y: g1 ==> g2
id2 (f · g1) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ y

  apply id2_left.
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f1 ==> f2
x ⋆ id2 g = x ▹ g


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f1 ==> f2
x ⋆ id2 g = x ▹ g

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f1 ==> f2
(x ▹ g) • (f2 ◃ id2 g) = x ▹ g

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f1 ==> f2
(x ▹ g) • id2 (f2 · g) = x ▹ g

  apply id2_right.
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
id2 f1 ⋆ id2 f2 = id2 (f1 · f2)


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
id2 f1 ⋆ id2 f2 = id2 (f1 · f2)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f1 ◃ id2 f2 = id2 (f1 · f2)

  apply lwhisker_id2.
Qed.


(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Interchange law                                                                 *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) = x1 ⋆ x2 • y1 ⋆ y2


C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) = x1 ⋆ x2 • y1 ⋆ y2

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) • ((y1 ▹ g2) • (h1 ◃ y2))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
(((x1 ▹ f2) • (g1 ◃ x2)) • (y1 ▹ g2)) • (h1 ◃ y2)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
(((f1 ◃ x2) • (x1 ▹ g2)) • (y1 ▹ g2)) • (h1 ◃ y2)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
((f1 ◃ x2) • ((x1 ▹ g2) • (y1 ▹ g2))) • (h1 ◃ y2)
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
((f1 ◃ x2) • ((x1 ▹ g2) • (y1 ▹ g2))) • (h1 ◃ y2) =
(((f1 ◃ x2) • (x1 ▹ g2)) • (y1 ▹ g2)) • (h1 ◃ y2)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
((f1 ◃ x2) • ((x1 ▹ g2) • (y1 ▹ g2))) • (h1 ◃ y2)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
((f1 ◃ x2) • ((x1 • y1) ▹ g2)) • (h1 ◃ y2)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
(((x1 • y1) ▹ f2) • (h1 ◃ x2)) • (h1 ◃ y2)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
((x1 • y1) ▹ f2) • ((h1 ◃ x2) • (h1 ◃ y2))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) =
((x1 • y1) ▹ f2) • (h1 ◃ (x2 • y2))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c: C
f1, g1, h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2, g2, h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
((x1 • y1) ▹ f2) • (h1 ◃ (x2 • y2)) =
((x1 • y1) ▹ f2) • (h1 ◃ (x2 • y2))

  apply idpath.
Qed.



C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
rassociator f g i • (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) =
((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
rassociator f g i • (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) =
((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator f g i)
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• (rassociator f g i • (f ◃ (x ▹ i))) =
lassociator f g i
• (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator f g i)
 apply  is_invertible_2cell_lassociator. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• (rassociator f g i • (f ◃ (x ▹ i))) =
lassociator f g i
• (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• (rassociator f g i • (f ◃ (x ▹ i))) = ?b
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
?b =
lassociator f g i
• (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• (rassociator f g i • (f ◃ (x ▹ i))) = ?b
 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(lassociator f g i • rassociator f g i)
• (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) = ?b

    
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i • rassociator f g i = ?y'
 apply lassociator_rassociator. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
id2 (f · (g · i)) • (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) =
lassociator f g i
• (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
f ◃ (x ▹ i) =
lassociator f g i
• (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator f h i)
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
(lassociator f g i
 • (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i))
• lassociator f h i

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator f h i)
 apply  is_invertible_2cell_lassociator. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i =
(lassociator f g i
 • (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i))
• lassociator f h i

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(lassociator f g i
 • (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i))
• lassociator f h i =
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• ((((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)
   • lassociator f h i) =
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• ((((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)
   • lassociator f h i) = ?b
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
?b = (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i
 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• ((((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)
   • lassociator f h i) = ?b
 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
(((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i)
• lassociator f h i = ?t2
 apply vassocl. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• (((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
   • (rassociator f h i • lassociator f h i)) =
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• (((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
   • (rassociator f h i • lassociator f h i)) = ?b

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
?b = (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i
 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i
• (((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
   • (rassociator f h i • lassociator f h i)) = ?b

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
rassociator f h i • lassociator f h i = ?t2
 apply rassociator_lassociator. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i • (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • id2 (f · h · i)) =
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i • (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • id2 (f · h · i)) =
?b
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
?b = (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i
 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i • (((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • id2 (f · h · i)) =
?b
 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • id2 (f · h · i) = ?t2
 apply id2_right. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> h
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i) =
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h i

  apply pathsinv0, rwhisker_lwhisker.
Qed.

(** Analog to law 8, lwhisker_lwhisker *)

C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
rassociator f g h • (f ◃ (g ◃ x)) =
(f · g ◃ x) • rassociator f g i


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
rassociator f g h • (f ◃ (g ◃ x)) =
(f · g ◃ x) • rassociator f g i

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
is_invertible_2cell (lassociator f g h)

a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
lassociator f g h
• (rassociator f g h • (f ◃ (g ◃ x))) =
lassociator f g h • ((f · g ◃ x) • rassociator f g i)

lassociator f g h
• (rassociator f g h • (f ◃ (g ◃ x))) =
lassociator f g h • ((f · g ◃ x) • rassociator f g i)

h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
((f · g ◃ x) • rassociator f g i) • lassociator f g i =
?t2
 apply vassocl.

• ((f · g ◃ x)
   • (rassociator f g i • lassociator f g i)) =

 apply rassociator_lassociator.

x: h ==> i

x: h ==> i
(f · g ◃ x) • id2 (f · g · i) = ?t2
 apply id2_right. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> i
lassociator f g h • (f · g ◃ x) =
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i

  apply pathsinv0, lwhisker_lwhisker.
Qed.

(** Analog to [rwhisker_rwhisker]. *)

C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
x: h ==> i
((x ▹ g) ▹ f) • rassociator i g f =
rassociator h g f • (x ▹ g · f)

C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
x: h ==> i
id2 (h · (g · f)) • (x ▹ g · f) =
(x ▹ g · f) • id2 (i · (g · f))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
x: h ==> i
id2 (h · (g · f)) • (x ▹ g · f) = ?b
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
x: h ==> i
?b = (x ▹ g · f) • id2 (i · (g · f))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
x: h ==> i
id2 (h · (g · f)) • (x ▹ g · f) = ?b
 apply id2_left.
  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
g: C ⟦ c, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ d, c ⟧
x: h ==> i
x ▹ g · f = (x ▹ g · f) • id2 (i · (g · f))
 apply pathsinv0, id2_right.
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• (f ◃ rassociator g h i) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• (f ◃ rassociator g h i) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

is_invertible_2cell (lassociator (f · g) h i)

g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧

i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
lassociator (f · g) h i
• (((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • rassociator f (g · h) i)
   • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)) =
lassociator (f · g) h i
• (rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i))

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(lassociator f g h ▹ i)
• (((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • rassociator f (g · h) i)
   • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)) = ?b
 apply maponpaths, vassocl.

a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(lassociator f g h ▹ i)
• ((rassociator f g h ▹ i)
   • (rassociator f (g · h) i
      • (f ◃ rassociator g h i))) = ?t2

a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧

i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h) ▹ i = ?y'

C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
• ((id2 (f · (g · h)) ▹ i)
   • (rassociator f (g · h) i
      • (f ◃ rassociator g h i))) =
lassociator f g (h · i)
• (lassociator (f · g) h i
   • (rassociator (f · g) h i
      • rassociator f g (h · i)))

• (lassociator (f · g) h i
   • (rassociator (f · g) h i
      • rassociator f g (h · i))) =
((f ◃ lassociator g h i) • lassociator f (g · h) i)
• ((id2 (f · (g · h)) ▹ i)
   • (rassociator f (g · h) i
      • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)))

h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(f ◃ lassociator g h i) • (f ◃ rassociator g h i) = ?b
 apply lwhisker_vcomp. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
f ◃ (lassociator g h i • rassociator g h i) =
id2 (f · (g · (h · i)))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
f ◃ (lassociator g h i • rassociator g h i) = ?b
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
?b = id2 (f · (g · (h · i)))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
f ◃ (lassociator g h i • rassociator g h i) = ?b
 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
lassociator g h i • rassociator g h i = ?t2

    apply lassociator_rassociator. 
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
f ◃ id2 (g · (h · i)) = id2 (f · (g · (h · i)))

  apply lwhisker_id2.
Qed.


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(rassociator f g h ⋆ id2 i • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• id2 f ⋆ rassociator g h i =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(rassociator f g h ⋆ id2 i • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• id2 f ⋆ rassociator g h i =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • (f · (g · h) ◃ id2 i))
 • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• ((id2 f ▹ g · h · i) • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • (f · (g · h) ◃ id2 i))
 • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• (id2 (f · (g · h · i)) • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
(((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • id2 (f · (g · h) · i))
 • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• (id2 (f · (g · h · i)) • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• (id2 (f · (g · h · i)) • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• (f ◃ rassociator g h i) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

  apply rassociator_rassociator.
Qed.

End Derived_laws.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Homs are categories                                                             *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Section Hom_Spaces.

Context {C : prebicat} (a b : C).

Definition hom_ob_mor
  : precategory_ob_mor
  := make_precategory_ob_mor (C⟦a,b⟧) (λ (f g : C⟦a,b⟧), f ==> g).

Definition hom_data
  : precategory_data
  := make_precategory_data hom_ob_mor id2 (λ f g h x y, x • y).


C: prebicat
a, b: C
is_precategory hom_data


C: prebicat
a, b: C
is_precategory hom_data

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
is_precategory_one_assoc hom_data

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
∏ (a0 b0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (f : a0 ==> b0), id2 a0 • f = f
C: prebicat
a, b: C
∏ (a0 b0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (f : a0 ==> b0), f • id2 b0 = f
C: prebicat
a, b: C
∏ (a0 b0 c d : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (f : a0 ==> b0)
(g : b0 ==> c) (h : c ==> d),
f • (g • h) = (f • g) • h

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
∏ (a0 b0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (f : a0 ==> b0), id2 a0 • f = f
 
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ f0 : f ==> g, id2 f • f0 = f0
 apply id2_left.
  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
∏ (a0 b0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (f : a0 ==> b0), f • id2 b0 = f
 
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ f0 : f ==> g, f0 • id2 g = f0
 apply id2_right.
  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
∏ (a0 b0 c d : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (f : a0 ==> b0)
(g : b0 ==> c) (h : c ==> d),
f • (g • h) = (f • g) • h
 
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g, h, i: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ (f0 : f ==> g) (g0 : g ==> h) (h0 : h ==> i),
f0 • (g0 • h0) = (f0 • g0) • h0
 apply vassocr.
Qed.

Definition hom_precategory
  : precategory
  := make_precategory hom_data is_precategory_hom.

End Hom_Spaces.


C: bicat
a, b: C
has_homsets (hom_data a b)


C: bicat
a, b: C
has_homsets (hom_data a b)

  exact (@cellset_property C a b).
Qed.

Definition hom {C : bicat} (a b : C) : category
  := hom_precategory a b ,, @cellset_property C a b.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Functor structure on horizontal composition.                                    *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Section hcomp_functor.

Context {C : bicat} {a b c : C}.


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
functor_data (category_binproduct (hom a b) (hom b c))
  (hom a c)


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
functor_data (category_binproduct (hom a b) (hom b c))
  (hom a c)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
∏ a0 b0 : category_binproduct (hom a b) (hom b c),
category_binproduct (hom a b) (hom b c) ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧
→ hom a c ⟦ pr1 a0 · pr2 a0, pr1 b0 · pr2 b0 ⟧

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
∏ a0 b0 : category_binproduct (hom a b) (hom b c),
category_binproduct (hom a b) (hom b c) ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧
→ hom a c ⟦ pr1 a0 · pr2 a0, pr1 b0 · pr2 b0 ⟧
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
∏ a0 b0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧,
precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
  (hom_ob_mor b c) a0 b0
→ pr1 a0 · pr2 a0 ==> pr1 b0 · pr2 b0
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
  (hom_ob_mor b c) (f1,, f2) (g1,, g2)
→ pr1 (f1,, f2) · pr2 (f1,, f2) ==>
  pr1 (g1,, g2) · pr2 (g1,, g2)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
hom_ob_mor a b ⟦ pr1 (f1,, f2), pr1 (g1,, g2) ⟧
× hom_ob_mor b c ⟦ pr2 (f1,, f2), pr2 (g1,, g2) ⟧
→ pr1 (f1,, f2) · pr2 (f1,, f2) ==>
  pr1 (g1,, g2) · pr2 (g1,, g2)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f1 ==> g1 × f2 ==> g2 → f1 · f2 ==> g1 · g2

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: f1 ==> g1
y: f2 ==> g2
f1 · f2 ==> g1 · g2
 apply hcomp; assumption.
Defined.


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
is_functor hcomp_functor_data


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
is_functor hcomp_functor_data

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
∏ a0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧,
id2 (pr1 a0) ⋆ id2 (pr2 a0) = id2 (pr1 a0 · pr2 a0)
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
∏ (a0 b0 c0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
       (hom_ob_mor b c) a0 b0)
(g : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
       (hom_ob_mor b c) b0 c0),
(pr1 f • pr1 g) ⋆ (pr2 f • pr2 g) =
pr1 f ⋆ pr2 f • pr1 g ⋆ pr2 g

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
∏ a0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧,
id2 (pr1 a0) ⋆ id2 (pr2 a0) = id2 (pr1 a0 · pr2 a0)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
id2 (pr1 (f1,, f2)) ⋆ id2 (pr2 (f1,, f2)) =
id2 (pr1 (f1,, f2) · pr2 (f1,, f2))
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
id2 f1 ⋆ id2 f2 = id2 (f1 · f2)
 apply hcomp_identity.
  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
∏ (a0 b0 c0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
       (hom_ob_mor b c) a0 b0)
(g : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
       (hom_ob_mor b c) b0 c0),
(pr1 f • pr1 g) ⋆ (pr2 f • pr2 g) =
pr1 f ⋆ pr2 f • pr1 g ⋆ pr2 g
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
       (hom_ob_mor b c) (f1,, f2) (g1,, g2))
(g : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
       (hom_ob_mor b c) (g1,, g2) (h1,, h2)),
(pr1 f • pr1 g) ⋆ (pr2 f • pr2 g) =
pr1 f ⋆ pr2 f • pr1 g ⋆ pr2 g

    
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏
(f : hom_ob_mor a b ⟦ pr1 (f1,, f2), pr1 (g1,, g2) ⟧
     × hom_ob_mor b c ⟦ pr2 (f1,, f2), pr2 (g1,, g2) ⟧)
(g : hom_ob_mor a b ⟦ pr1 (g1,, g2), pr1 (h1,, h2) ⟧
     × hom_ob_mor b c ⟦ pr2 (g1,, g2), pr2 (h1,, h2) ⟧),
(pr1 f • pr1 g) ⋆ (pr2 f • pr2 g) =
pr1 f ⋆ pr2 f • pr1 g ⋆ pr2 g
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ (f : f1 ==> g1 × f2 ==> g2)
(g : g1 ==> h1 × g2 ==> h2),
(pr1 f • pr1 g) ⋆ (pr2 f • pr2 g) =
pr1 f ⋆ pr2 f • pr1 g ⋆ pr2 g

    
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(pr1 (x1,, x2) • pr1 (y1,, y2))
⋆ (pr2 (x1,, x2) • pr2 (y1,, y2)) = x1 ⋆ x2 • y1 ⋆ y2
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
y1: g1 ==> h1
y2: g2 ==> h2
(x1 • y1) ⋆ (x2 • y2) = x1 ⋆ x2 • y1 ⋆ y2
 apply hcomp_vcomp.
Qed.

Definition hcomp_functor
  : category_binproduct
      (hom a b) (hom b c)
    ⟶
    hom a c
  := make_functor hcomp_functor_data is_functor_hcomp.

(** and the two whiskering functors separately so as to avoid [category_binproduct] *)


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom b c) (hom a c)


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom b c) (hom a c)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ a0 b0 : hom b c,
hom b c ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧ → hom a c ⟦ f · a0, f · b0 ⟧

  exact (fun g1 g2 x => f ◃ x).
Defined.


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor (lwhisker_functor_data f)


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor (lwhisker_functor_data f)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ a0 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ◃ id2 a0 = id2 (f · a0)
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ (a0 b0 c0 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (f0 : a0 ==> b0)
(g : b0 ==> c0), f ◃ (f0 • g) = (f ◃ f0) • (f ◃ g)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ a0 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ◃ id2 a0 = id2 (f · a0)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ id2 g = id2 (f · g)
 apply lwhisker_id2.
  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ (a0 b0 c0 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧) (f0 : a0 ==> b0)
(g : b0 ==> c0), f ◃ (f0 • g) = (f ◃ f0) • (f ◃ g)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2, g3: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g1 ==> g2
y: g2 ==> g3
f ◃ (x • y) = (f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y)
 apply pathsinv0, lwhisker_vcomp.
Qed.

Definition lwhisker_functor (f : C⟦a, b⟧) : functor (hom b c) (hom a c)
  := make_functor (lwhisker_functor_data f) (is_functor_lwhisker f).


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
functor_data (hom a b) (hom a c)


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
functor_data (hom a b) (hom a c)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ a0 b0 : hom a b,
hom a b ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧ → hom a c ⟦ a0 · g, b0 · g ⟧

  exact (fun f1 f2 x => x ▹ g).
Defined.


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
is_functor (rwhisker_functor_data g)


C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
is_functor (rwhisker_functor_data g)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ a0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, id2 a0 ▹ g = id2 (a0 · g)
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ (a0 b0 c0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (f : a0 ==> b0)
(g0 : b0 ==> c0), (f • g0) ▹ g = (f ▹ g) • (g0 ▹ g)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ a0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, id2 a0 ▹ g = id2 (a0 · g)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
id2 f ▹ g = id2 (f · g)
 apply id2_rwhisker.
  
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
∏ (a0 b0 c0 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (f : a0 ==> b0)
(g0 : b0 ==> c0), (f • g0) ▹ g = (f ▹ g) • (g0 ▹ g)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f1, f2, f3: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f1 ==> f2
y: f2 ==> f3
(x • y) ▹ g = (x ▹ g) • (y ▹ g)
 apply pathsinv0, rwhisker_vcomp.
Qed.

Definition rwhisker_functor (g : C⟦b, c⟧) : functor (hom a b) (hom a c)
  := make_functor (rwhisker_functor_data g) (is_functor_rwhisker g).


End hcomp_functor.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Chaotic bicat                                                                   *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Section chaotic_bicat.

Variable C : precategory.


C: precategory
prebicat_data


C: precategory
prebicat_data

  
C: precategory
prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
C: precategory
(λ C : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells,
 prebicat_2_id_comp_struct C) ?pr1

  
C: precategory
prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
 
C: precategory
precategory_data
C: precategory
(λ C : precategory_data, prebicat_2cell_struct C) ?pr1

    
C: precategory
precategory_data
 exact C.
    
C: precategory
(λ C : precategory_data, prebicat_2cell_struct C) C
 
C: precategory
prebicat_2cell_struct C
 
C: precategory
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
UU
 exact unit.
  
C: precategory
(λ C : prebicat_1_id_comp_cells,
 prebicat_2_id_comp_struct C)
  (C,,
   (((λ (a b : C) (_ _ : C ⟦ a, b ⟧), unit)
     :
     prebicat_2cell_struct C)
    :
    (λ C : precategory_data, prebicat_2cell_struct C)
      C))
 cbn; repeat (use tpair); cbn; intros; exact tt.
Defined.


C: precategory
prebicat_laws chaotic_prebicat_data


C: precategory
prebicat_laws chaotic_prebicat_data

  repeat apply make_dirprod; intros; apply isProofIrrelevantUnit.
Qed.

Definition chaotic_prebicat : prebicat
  := chaotic_prebicat_data,, chaotic_prebicat_laws.


C: precategory
isaset_cells chaotic_prebicat


C: precategory
isaset_cells chaotic_prebicat

  
C: precategory
∏ (a b : chaotic_prebicat)
(f g : chaotic_prebicat ⟦ a, b ⟧), isaset (f ==> g)
 
C: precategory
∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → isaset unit
 
C: precategory
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
isaset unit
 exact isasetunit.
Qed.

Definition chaotic_bicat : bicat
  := chaotic_prebicat,, isaset_chaotic_cells.

End chaotic_bicat.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Associators and unitors are isos.                                               *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Section Associators_Unitors_Iso.

Context {C : prebicat}.


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_z_isomorphism
  (lassociator f g h
   :
   hom_precategory a d ⟦ f · (g · h), f · g · h ⟧)


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_z_isomorphism
  (lassociator f g h
   :
   hom_precategory a d ⟦ f · (g · h), f · g · h ⟧)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_inverse_in_precat (lassociator f g h)
  (rassociator f g h)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
lassociator f g h · rassociator f g h =
identity (f · (g · h))
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
rassociator f g h · lassociator f g h =
identity (f · g · h)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
lassociator f g h · rassociator f g h =
identity (f · (g · h))
 apply lassociator_rassociator.
  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
rassociator f g h · lassociator f g h =
identity (f · g · h)
 apply rassociator_lassociator.
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_iso
  (lassociator f g h
   :
   hom_precategory a d ⟦ f · (g · h), f · g · h ⟧)


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_iso
  (lassociator f g h
   :
   hom_precategory a d ⟦ f · (g · h), f · g · h ⟧)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_z_isomorphism (lassociator f g h)

  apply is_z_iso_lassociator.
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_z_isomorphism
  (rassociator f g h
   :
   hom_precategory a d ⟦ f · g · h, f · (g · h) ⟧)


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_z_isomorphism
  (rassociator f g h
   :
   hom_precategory a d ⟦ f · g · h, f · (g · h) ⟧)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_inverse_in_precat (rassociator f g h)
  (lassociator f g h)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
rassociator f g h · lassociator f g h =
identity (f · g · h)
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
lassociator f g h · rassociator f g h =
identity (f · (g · h))

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
rassociator f g h · lassociator f g h =
identity (f · g · h)
 apply rassociator_lassociator.
  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
lassociator f g h · rassociator f g h =
identity (f · (g · h))
 apply lassociator_rassociator.
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_iso
  (rassociator f g h
   :
   hom_precategory a d ⟦ f · g · h, f · (g · h) ⟧)


C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_iso
  (rassociator f g h
   :
   hom_precategory a d ⟦ f · g · h, f · (g · h) ⟧)

  
C: prebicat
a, b, c, d: C
f: hom_precategory a b
g: hom_precategory b c
h: hom_precategory c d
is_z_isomorphism (rassociator f g h)

  apply is_z_iso_rassociator.
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_z_isomorphism
  (lunitor f
   :
   hom_precategory a b ⟦ identity a · f, f ⟧)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_z_isomorphism
  (lunitor f
   :
   hom_precategory a b ⟦ identity a · f, f ⟧)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_inverse_in_precat (lunitor f) (linvunitor f)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
lunitor f · linvunitor f = identity (identity a · f)
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
linvunitor f · lunitor f = identity f

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
lunitor f · linvunitor f = identity (identity a · f)
 apply lunitor_linvunitor.
  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
linvunitor f · lunitor f = identity f
 apply linvunitor_lunitor.
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_iso
  (lunitor f
   :
   hom_precategory a b ⟦ identity a · f, f ⟧)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_iso
  (lunitor f
   :
   hom_precategory a b ⟦ identity a · f, f ⟧)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_z_isomorphism (lunitor f)

  apply is_z_iso_lunitor.
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_z_isomorphism
  (runitor f
   :
   hom_precategory a b ⟦ f · identity b, f ⟧)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_z_isomorphism
  (runitor f
   :
   hom_precategory a b ⟦ f · identity b, f ⟧)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_inverse_in_precat (runitor f) (rinvunitor f)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
runitor f · rinvunitor f = identity (f · identity b)
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
rinvunitor f · runitor f = identity f

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
runitor f · rinvunitor f = identity (f · identity b)
 apply runitor_rinvunitor.
  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
rinvunitor f · runitor f = identity f
 apply rinvunitor_runitor.
Defined.


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_iso
  (runitor f
   :
   hom_precategory a b ⟦ f · identity b, f ⟧)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_iso
  (runitor f
   :
   hom_precategory a b ⟦ f · identity b, f ⟧)

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f: hom_precategory a b
is_z_isomorphism (runitor f)

  apply is_z_iso_runitor.
Defined.

End Associators_Unitors_Iso.

(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)
(** ** Functor structure on associators and unitors.                                   *)
(* ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- *)

Section Associators_Unitors_Natural.

Context {C : prebicat}.

(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)
(** Left unitor                                                                       *)
(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
id2 (identity a) ⋆ x • lunitor g = lunitor f • x


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
id2 (identity a) ⋆ x • lunitor g = lunitor f • x

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
((id2 (identity a) ▹ f) • (identity a ◃ x))
• lunitor g = lunitor f • x

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(id2 (identity a) ▹ f)
• ((identity a ◃ x) • lunitor g) = lunitor f • x
 
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(id2 (identity a) ▹ f) • (lunitor f • x) =
lunitor f • x

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
((id2 (identity a) ▹ f) • lunitor f) • x =
lunitor f • x
 
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(id2 (identity a) ▹ f) • lunitor f = lunitor f

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
id2 (identity a · f) • lunitor f = lunitor f
 apply id2_left.
Qed.

(*

Definition lunitor_transf (a b : C)
  : bindelta_pair_functor
      (constant_functor (hom_precategory a b) (hom_precategory a a) (identity a))
      (functor_identity (hom_precategory a b)) ∙
    hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    functor_identity (hom_precategory a b)
  := lunitor,, lunitor_natural a b.
 *)

(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)
(** Right unitor                                                                      *)
(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
x ⋆ id2 (identity b) • runitor g = runitor f • x


C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
x ⋆ id2 (identity b) • runitor g = runitor f • x

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
hcomp' x (id2 (identity b)) • runitor g =
runitor f • x
 
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
((f ◃ id2 (identity b)) • (x ▹ identity b))
• runitor g = runitor f • x

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(f ◃ id2 (identity b))
• ((x ▹ identity b) • runitor g) = runitor f • x

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(f ◃ id2 (identity b)) • (runitor f • x) =
runitor f • x

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
((f ◃ id2 (identity b)) • runitor f) • x =
runitor f • x
 
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
(f ◃ id2 (identity b)) • runitor f = runitor f

  
C: prebicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
id2 (f · identity b) • runitor f = runitor f
 apply id2_left.
Qed.

(*
Definition runitor_transf (a b : C)
  : bindelta_pair_functor
       (functor_identity (hom_precategory a b))
       (constant_functor (hom_precategory a b) (hom_precategory b b) (identity b)) ∙
    hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    functor_identity (hom_precategory a b).
Proof.
  exists runitor. red. apply runitor_natural.
Defined.
 *)

(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)
(** Left associator.                                                                  *)
(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)

Definition lassociator_fun {a b c d : C}
           (x : C⟦a,b⟧ × C⟦b,c⟧ × C⟦c,d⟧)
  :  pr1 x · (pr12 x · pr22 x) ==> (pr1 x · pr12 x) · pr22 x
  := lassociator (pr1 x) (pr12 x) (pr22 x).

(*
Lemma lassociator_fun_natural {a b c d : C}
  : is_nat_trans
      (pair_functor (functor_identity (hom_precategory a b)) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor)
      (precategory_binproduct_assoc
         (hom_precategory a b)
         (hom_precategory b c)
         (hom_precategory c d) ∙
       pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙
       hcomp_functor)
      lassociator_fun.
Proof.
  red; cbn. intros (f1, (f2, f3)) (g1, (g2, g3)).
  unfold precategory_binproduct_mor, hom_ob_mor. cbn.
  unfold precategory_binproduct_mor, hom_ob_mor. cbn.
  intros (x1, (x2, x3)). cbn.
  unfold lassociator_fun. cbn.
  apply hcomp_lassoc.
Qed.

Definition lassociator_transf (a b c d : C)
  : pair_functor (functor_identity (hom_precategory a b)) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    precategory_binproduct_assoc
      (hom_precategory a b)
      (hom_precategory b c)
      (hom_precategory c d) ∙
    pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙
    hcomp_functor
  := lassociator_fun,, lassociator_fun_natural.
 *)
(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)
(** Right associator.                                                                 *)
(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)

Definition rassociator_fun {a b c d : C}
           (x : C⟦a,b⟧ × C⟦b,c⟧ × C⟦c,d⟧)
  : (pr1 x · pr12 x) · pr22 x ==> pr1 x · (pr12 x · pr22 x)
  := rassociator (pr1 x) (pr12 x) (pr22 x).

(*
Lemma rassociator_fun_natural {a b c d : C}
  : is_nat_trans
      (precategory_binproduct_assoc
         (hom_precategory a b)
         (hom_precategory b c)
         (hom_precategory c d) ∙
       pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙
       hcomp_functor)
      (pair_functor (functor_identity _) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor)
      rassociator_fun.
Proof.
  red; cbn. intros (f1, (f2, f3)) (g1, (g2, g3)).
  unfold precategory_binproduct_mor, hom_ob_mor. cbn.
  unfold precategory_binproduct_mor, hom_ob_mor. cbn.
  intros (x1, (x2, x3)). cbn.
  unfold rassociator_fun. cbn.
  apply hcomp_rassoc.
Qed.

Definition rassociator_transf (a b c d : C)
  : precategory_binproduct_assoc
      (hom_precategory a b)
      (hom_precategory b c)
      (hom_precategory c d) ∙
    pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙
    hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    pair_functor (functor_identity _) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor
  := rassociator_fun,, rassociator_fun_natural.
 *)

Definition rassociator_fun' {a b c d : C}
           (x : (C⟦a,b⟧ × C⟦b,c⟧) × C⟦c,d⟧)
  : (pr11 x · pr21 x) · pr2 x ==> pr11 x · (pr21 x · pr2 x)
  := rassociator (pr11 x) (pr21 x) (pr2 x).

(*
Lemma rassociator_fun'_natural {a b c d : C}
  : is_nat_trans
      (pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙ hcomp_functor)
      (precategory_binproduct_unassoc
         (hom_precategory a b)
         (hom_precategory b c)
         (hom_precategory c d) ∙
       pair_functor (functor_identity _) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor)
      rassociator_fun'.
Proof.
  red; cbn. intros ((f1, f2), f3) ((g1, g2), g3).
  unfold precategory_binproduct_mor, hom_ob_mor. cbn.
  unfold precategory_binproduct_mor, hom_ob_mor. cbn.
  intros ((x1, x2), x3). cbn.
  unfold rassociator_fun. cbn.
  apply hcomp_rassoc.
Qed.

Definition rassociator_transf' (a b c d : C)
  : pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙
    hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    precategory_binproduct_unassoc
      (hom_precategory a b)
      (hom_precategory b c)
      (hom_precategory c d) ∙
    pair_functor (functor_identity _) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor
  := rassociator_fun',, rassociator_fun'_natural.
 *)
End Associators_Unitors_Natural.

Section Associators_Unitors_Natural_bicat.

  Context {C : bicat}.

  Definition lunitor_transf (a b : C)
  : bindelta_pair_functor
      (constant_functor (hom a b) (hom a a) (identity a))
      (functor_identity (hom a b)) ∙
    hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    functor_identity (hom a b)
  := lunitor,, lunitor_natural a b.

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
bindelta_pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
  (constant_functor (hom a b) (hom b b) (identity b))
∙ hcomp_functor ⟹ functor_identity (hom a b)


C: bicat
a, b: C
bindelta_pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
  (constant_functor (hom a b) (hom b b) (identity b))
∙ hcomp_functor ⟹ functor_identity (hom a b)

  
C: bicat
a, b: C
is_nat_trans
  (bindelta_pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
     (constant_functor (hom a b) (hom b b)
        (identity b)) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  (functor_identity (hom a b)) runitor
 
C: bicat
a, b: C
∏ (x x' : hom a b) (f : hom a b ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (bindelta_pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
     (constant_functor (hom a b) (hom b b)
        (identity b)) ∙ hcomp_functor) f · runitor x' =
runitor x · # (functor_identity (hom a b)) f
 apply runitor_natural.
Defined.


C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
is_nat_trans
  (pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
     hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor)
  ((precategory_binproduct_assoc (hom a b) (hom b c)
      (hom c d)
    ∙ pair_functor hcomp_functor
        (functor_identity (hom c d))) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  lassociator_fun


C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
is_nat_trans
  (pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
     hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor)
  ((precategory_binproduct_assoc (hom a b) (hom b c)
      (hom c d)
    ∙ pair_functor hcomp_functor
        (functor_identity (hom c d))) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  lassociator_fun

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
∏ (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧ × C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
       (precategory_binproduct_ob_mor (hom_ob_mor b c)
          (hom_ob_mor c d)) x x'),
pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f) • lassociator_fun x' =
lassociator_fun x • pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
      (precategory_binproduct_ob_mor (hom_ob_mor b c)
         (hom_ob_mor c d)) (f1,, f2,, f3)
      (g1,, g2,, g3),
pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)
• lassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
lassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (λ f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, f ==> g)
    ⟦ pr1 (f1,, f2,, f3), pr1 (g1,, g2,, g3) ⟧
    × precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g))
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (λ f g : C ⟦ c, d ⟧, f ==> g))
      ⟦ pr2 (f1,, f2,, f3), pr2 (g1,, g2,, g3) ⟧,
pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)
• lassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
lassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : f1 ==> g1
    × precategory_binproduct_mor
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g))
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (λ f g : C ⟦ c, d ⟧, f ==> g)) (f2,, f3)
        (g2,, g3),
pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)
• lassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
lassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : f1 ==> g1
    × make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
        (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g) ⟦ pr1 (f2,, f3),
      pr1 (g2,, g3) ⟧
      × make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
          (λ f g : C ⟦ c, d ⟧, f ==> g)
        ⟦ pr2 (f2,, f3), pr2 (g2,, g3) ⟧,
pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)
• lassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
lassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏ f : f1 ==> g1 × f2 ==> g2 × f3 ==> g3,
pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)
• lassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
lassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
pr1 (x1,, x2,, x3)
⋆ (pr12 (x1,, x2,, x3) ⋆ pr22 (x1,, x2,, x3))
• lassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
lassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 (x1,, x2,, x3) ⋆ pr12 (x1,, x2,, x3)
  ⋆ pr22 (x1,, x2,, x3)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3) • lassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
lassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3) • x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)
• lassociator (pr1 (g1,, g2,, g3))
    (pr12 (g1,, g2,, g3)) (pr22 (g1,, g2,, g3)) =
lassociator (pr1 (f1,, f2,, f3)) (pr12 (f1,, f2,, f3))
  (pr22 (f1,, f2,, f3)) • x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3) • lassociator g1 g2 g3 =
lassociator f1 f2 f3 • x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3

  apply hcomp_lassoc.
Qed.

Definition lassociator_transf (a b c d : C)
  : pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b)) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    precategory_binproduct_assoc
      (hom a b)
      (hom b c)
      (hom c d) ∙
    pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙
    hcomp_functor
  := lassociator_fun,, lassociator_fun_natural.

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
is_nat_trans
  ((precategory_binproduct_assoc (hom a b) (hom b c)
      (hom c d)
    ∙ pair_functor hcomp_functor
        (functor_identity (hom c d))) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  (pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
     hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor) rassociator_fun


C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
is_nat_trans
  ((precategory_binproduct_assoc (hom a b) (hom b c)
      (hom c d)
    ∙ pair_functor hcomp_functor
        (functor_identity (hom c d))) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  (pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
     hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor) rassociator_fun

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
∏ (x x' : C ⟦ a, b ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧ × C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
       (precategory_binproduct_ob_mor (hom_ob_mor b c)
          (hom_ob_mor c d)) x x'),
pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f • rassociator_fun x' =
rassociator_fun x • pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : precategory_binproduct_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
      (precategory_binproduct_ob_mor (hom_ob_mor b c)
         (hom_ob_mor c d)) (f1,, f2,, f3)
      (g1,, g2,, g3),
pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f
• rassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
rassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
      (λ f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, f ==> g)
    ⟦ pr1 (f1,, f2,, f3), pr1 (g1,, g2,, g3) ⟧
    × precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g))
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (λ f g : C ⟦ c, d ⟧, f ==> g))
      ⟦ pr2 (f1,, f2,, f3), pr2 (g1,, g2,, g3) ⟧,
pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f
• rassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
rassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : f1 ==> g1
    × precategory_binproduct_mor
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
           (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g))
        (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
           (λ f g : C ⟦ c, d ⟧, f ==> g)) (f2,, f3)
        (g2,, g3),
pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f
• rassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
rassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : f1 ==> g1
    × make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
        (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g) ⟦ pr1 (f2,, f3),
      pr1 (g2,, g3) ⟧
      × make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
          (λ f g : C ⟦ c, d ⟧, f ==> g)
        ⟦ pr2 (f2,, f3), pr2 (g2,, g3) ⟧,
pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f
• rassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
rassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏ f : f1 ==> g1 × f2 ==> g2 × f3 ==> g3,
pr1 f ⋆ pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f
• rassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
rassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 f ⋆ (pr12 f ⋆ pr22 f)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
pr1 (x1,, x2,, x3) ⋆ pr12 (x1,, x2,, x3)
⋆ pr22 (x1,, x2,, x3) • rassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
rassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3)
• pr1 (x1,, x2,, x3)
  ⋆ (pr12 (x1,, x2,, x3) ⋆ pr22 (x1,, x2,, x3))
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 • rassociator_fun (g1,, g2,, g3) =
rassociator_fun (f1,, f2,, f3) • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3
• rassociator (pr1 (g1,, g2,, g3))
    (pr12 (g1,, g2,, g3)) (pr22 (g1,, g2,, g3)) =
rassociator (pr1 (f1,, f2,, f3)) (pr12 (f1,, f2,, f3))
  (pr22 (f1,, f2,, f3)) • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 • rassociator g1 g2 g3 =
rassociator f1 f2 f3 • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)

  apply hcomp_rassoc.
Qed.

Definition rassociator_transf (a b c d : C)
  : precategory_binproduct_assoc
      (hom a b)
      (hom b c)
      (hom c d) ∙
    pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙
    hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    pair_functor (functor_identity _) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor
  := rassociator_fun,, rassociator_fun_natural.


C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
is_nat_trans
  (pair_functor hcomp_functor
     (functor_identity (hom c d)) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc (hom a b) (hom b c)
      (hom c d)
    ∙ pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
        hcomp_functor) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  rassociator_fun'


C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
is_nat_trans
  (pair_functor hcomp_functor
     (functor_identity (hom c d)) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  ((precategory_binproduct_unassoc (hom a b) (hom b c)
      (hom c d)
    ∙ pair_functor (functor_identity (hom a b))
        hcomp_functor) ∙ hcomp_functor)
  rassociator_fun'

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
∏ (x x' : (C ⟦ a, b ⟧ × C ⟦ b, c ⟧) × C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (precategory_binproduct_ob_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
          (hom_ob_mor b c)) (hom_ob_mor c d) x x'),
pr11 f ⋆ pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f • rassociator_fun' x' =
rassociator_fun' x • pr11 f ⋆ (pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : precategory_binproduct_mor
      (precategory_binproduct_ob_mor (hom_ob_mor a b)
         (hom_ob_mor b c)) (hom_ob_mor c d)
      ((f1,, f2),, f3) ((g1,, g2),, g3),
pr11 f ⋆ pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f
• rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3)
• pr11 f ⋆ (pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor
      (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (λ f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, f ==> g))
      (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g))
    ⟦ pr1 ((f1,, f2),, f3), pr1 ((g1,, g2),, g3) ⟧
    × make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ c, d ⟧)
        (λ f g : C ⟦ c, d ⟧, f ==> g)
      ⟦ pr2 ((f1,, f2),, f3), pr2 ((g1,, g2),, g3) ⟧,
pr11 f ⋆ pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f
• rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3)
• pr11 f ⋆ (pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : precategory_binproduct_mor
      (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
         (λ f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, f ==> g))
      (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g)) (f1,, f2)
      (g1,, g2) × f3 ==> g3,
pr11 f ⋆ pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f
• rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3)
• pr11 f ⋆ (pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏
f : (make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
       (λ f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, f ==> g) ⟦ pr1 (f1,, f2),
     pr1 (g1,, g2) ⟧
     × make_precategory_ob_mor (C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
         (λ f g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧, f ==> g)
       ⟦ pr2 (f1,, f2), pr2 (g1,, g2) ⟧) × f3 ==> g3,
pr11 f ⋆ pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f
• rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3)
• pr11 f ⋆ (pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
∏ f : (f1 ==> g1 × f2 ==> g2) × f3 ==> g3,
pr11 f ⋆ pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f
• rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3)
• pr11 f ⋆ (pr21 f ⋆ pr2 f)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
pr11 ((x1,, x2),, x3) ⋆ pr21 ((x1,, x2),, x3)
⋆ pr2 ((x1,, x2),, x3)
• rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3)
• pr11 ((x1,, x2),, x3)
  ⋆ (pr21 ((x1,, x2),, x3) ⋆ pr2 ((x1,, x2),, x3))
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 • rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3) • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)

  
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 • rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3) • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)
 
C: bicat
a, b, c, d: C
f1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
g1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g3: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
x1: f1 ==> g1
x2: f2 ==> g2
x3: f3 ==> g3
x1 ⋆ x2 ⋆ x3 • rassociator_fun' ((g1,, g2),, g3) =
rassociator_fun' ((f1,, f2),, f3) • x1 ⋆ (x2 ⋆ x3)

  apply hcomp_rassoc.
Qed.

Definition rassociator_transf' (a b c d : C)
  : pair_functor hcomp_functor (functor_identity _) ∙
    hcomp_functor
    ⟹
    precategory_binproduct_unassoc
      (hom a b)
      (hom b c)
      (hom c d) ∙
    pair_functor (functor_identity _) hcomp_functor ∙ hcomp_functor
  := rassociator_fun',, rassociator_fun'_natural.

End Associators_Unitors_Natural_bicat.

(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)
(** ** Precomposition functor                                                         *)
(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)

B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom b z) (hom a z)


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom b z) (hom a z)

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
hom b z → hom a z
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ a0 b0 : hom b z,
hom b z ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧ → hom a z ⟦ ?F a0, ?F b0 ⟧

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
hom b z → hom a z
 exact (λ g, f · g).
  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ a0 b0 : hom b z,
hom b z ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧
→ hom a z ⟦ (λ g : hom b z, f · g) a0,
  (λ g : hom b z, f · g) b0 ⟧
 exact (λ g₁ g₂ α, f ◃ α).
Defined.


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor (pre_comp_data z f)


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor (pre_comp_data z f)

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_idax (pre_comp_data z f)
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_compax (pre_comp_data z f)

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_idax (pre_comp_data z f)
 
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
a0: hom b z
f ◃ id2 a0 = id2 (f · a0)

    apply lwhisker_id2.
  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_compax (pre_comp_data z f)
 
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
a0, b0, c: hom b z
f0: hom b z ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧
g: hom b z ⟦ b0, c ⟧
f ◃ (f0 • g) = (f ◃ f0) • (f ◃ g)

    
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
a0, b0, c: hom b z
f0: hom b z ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧
g: hom b z ⟦ b0, c ⟧
(f ◃ f0) • (f ◃ g) = f ◃ (f0 • g)

    apply lwhisker_vcomp.
Qed.


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
hom b z ⟶ hom a z


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
hom b z ⟶ hom a z

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom b z) (hom a z)
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor ?F

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom b z) (hom a z)
 exact (pre_comp_data z f).
  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor (pre_comp_data z f)
 exact (pre_comp_is_functor z f).
Defined.

(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)
(** ** Postcomposition functor                                                        *)
(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)

B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom z a) (hom z b)


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom z a) (hom z b)

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
hom z a → hom z b
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ a0 b0 : hom z a,
hom z a ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧ → hom z b ⟦ ?F a0, ?F b0 ⟧

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
hom z a → hom z b
 exact (λ g, g · f).
  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
∏ a0 b0 : hom z a,
hom z a ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧
→ hom z b ⟦ (λ g : hom z a, g · f) a0,
  (λ g : hom z a, g · f) b0 ⟧
 exact (λ g₁ g₂ α, α ▹ f).
Defined.


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor (post_comp_data z f)


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor (post_comp_data z f)

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_idax (post_comp_data z f)
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_compax (post_comp_data z f)

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_idax (post_comp_data z f)
 
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
a0: hom z a
id2 a0 ▹ f = id2 (a0 · f)

    apply id2_rwhisker.
  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_compax (post_comp_data z f)
 
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
a0, b0, c: hom z a
f0: hom z a ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧
g: hom z a ⟦ b0, c ⟧
(f0 • g) ▹ f = (f0 ▹ f) • (g ▹ f)

    
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
a0, b0, c: hom z a
f0: hom z a ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧
g: hom z a ⟦ b0, c ⟧
(f0 ▹ f) • (g ▹ f) = (f0 • g) ▹ f

    apply rwhisker_vcomp.
Qed.


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
hom z a ⟶ hom z b


B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
hom z a ⟶ hom z b

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom z a) (hom z b)
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor ?F

  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
functor_data (hom z a) (hom z b)
 exact (post_comp_data z f).
  
B: bicat
z, a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_functor (post_comp_data z f)
 exact (post_comp_is_functor z f).
Defined.

(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)
(** ** Notations.                                                                     *)
(* -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------*)

Module Notations.


Setting g constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ==> _".


Setting g constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ <== _".


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ • _".


Setting x constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ◃ _".


Setting g constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ▹ _".

Notation "f ◅ x" := (rwhisker f x) (at level 60, only parsing). (* \tw nr 5*)
Notation "y ▻ g" := (lwhisker g y) (at level 60, only parsing). (* \tw nr 6 *)

Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ ⋆ _".


Identifier 'o' now a keyword

Notation "'id₁'" := identity.
Notation "'id₂'" := id2.
Notation " b ⋆⋆ a" := (a ⋆ b) (at level 30).
Open Scope bicategory_scope.

End Notations.
